Name: OBJ_ACT_PARAM_ST
Description: Settings for characters interacting with objects

Fields.Description: MsgID of the menu displayed when the action is enabled
MsgID of the menu to display when the action fails
Event flag for unconditionally passing special conditions
This is the animation ID of the player character during action
Anime ID for enemy actions etc.
This is the effective distance of the action
This is the dummy poly ID that is the action position of the object
Should the events used in ObjAct execution judgment be synchronized? Basically set to ×. It may be set to ○ only if the actor is not important.
This is the animation ID when the object is in action
The effective angle of the player's actions. Effective angular difference between the player's orientation vector and the object's orientation vector
The effective angle of the object's action. Effective angle difference between object action vector and character vector
This is how to attract characters during object action
